{{CargoOrgan
|name=Ultimate Mouthparts
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10917
|idx=117
|description=The organ is obtained by infusing embryonic stem cells with the ultimate bionic part essence, having a leap in performance.
|skill=
|hp=3520
|def=225
|atk=274
|rush=219
|gene1=Fire DMG +120
|gene2=Fire RES +120
|gene3=Against main species, DMG +12%
|gene4=Against main species, Crit DMG +20%
|gene5=Per Orange Coating crafted, gain +1 by +10%
|gene6=All FAME Bionic Parts ELMT RES +2%
|gene7=Fire DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
